name: Alltown Bus Co
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State (Business Entity Search not directly accessed; founding year per PitchBook/Dun & Bradstreet)
notes: Legal carrier name is ALLTOWN BUS SERVICE INC. SAFER physical address is Skokie HQ (7300 N St Louis) rather than the Decatur branch (1610 N Brant Ct). Company was founded in 1994 and acquired by Beacon Mobility on June 14, 2022. Operates 700+ buses across 7 locations (Skokie, Harvey, Decatur IL; Davenport IA; Detroit MI etc.). Decatur site is a branch yard. Could not directly access IL SOS business entity search (HTTP 403) to confirm formal incorporation date or officers; PitchBook/Dun & Bradstreet cite 1994 founding.

name: North Iowa Bus Co Inc
carrier_operation: unknown (intrastate IA school bus operations likely; affiliated charter coach operations run under Cavalier Coaches Inc USDOT 230841 / MC-178731 in Owatonna MN)
fmcsa_address: unknown (Mason City IA location at 2101 15th St SW, Mason City, IA 50401; PO Box 1561, Mason City IA 50402)
inc_date: unknown (family business in transportation since early 1960s; Mason City IA operations long-established)
officers: John Regan (manager per BBB); Regan family ownership under Agnes Corporation; founder William 'Bill' Regan (1932-2024)
registry_source: Iowa Secretary of State (not directly accessed); BBB, Greater Mason City Chamber, company web/local sources
notes: No direct SAFER record found under 'North Iowa Bus' or 'North Iowa Bus Company' in Mason City IA - searches in the SAFER database returned 'no records matching' that name. Operations may be conducted under a sister entity. Affiliated charter operator Cavalier Coaches Inc (USDOT 230841, MC-178731, Owatonna MN; 18 power units, 48 drivers, Satisfactory rating 4/16/2025) is the FMCSA-registered motorcoach arm of the Regan family / Agnes Corporation. School bus fleet across MN/IA reportedly exceeds 200 buses (incl. Mason City); fleet size at Mason City alone is unknown. Confidence low because no carrier record could be conclusively tied to the Mason City legal entity.

name: Valcheck Frank D Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private Passenger (Non-Business); NOT authorized for for-hire interstate (operates intrastate school bus / private passenger)
inc_date: 1963 (year established per Hillsborough Business Association; exact NJ incorporation filing date not retrieved)
officers: Dennis Valcheck (Owner); founder Frank D. Valcheck
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue Business Name Search (not directly accessed); Hillsborough Business Association; NJ School Bus Contractors Association directory; D&B
notes: SAFER snapshot fleet breakdown: 17 large school buses (16+ pax), 2 small school buses (1-8 pax), 2 vans. Phone (908) 359-5711. Transports ~1,500 students daily. Member of NJ School Bus Contractors Association. No formal MC number listed (not for-hire interstate). Listed in NJ DOE 2020-21 School Bus Contractor codes.

name: Brad & Kim Dalrymple Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate Passenger Transportation (school bus / charter); DBA Dalrymple Transportation
fmcsa_status: Active (per BBB and third-party trackers; SAFER snapshot page returned 'inactive' on 06/03/2026 query, but Quick Transport Solutions, BBB, BrokerSnapshot all show active with MCS-150 update 06-JUN-2024)
officers: Kyle Dalrymple (Chief Operating Officer); Brad Dalrymple, Kim Dalrymple (principals/owners)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue Business Name Search (not directly accessed); BBB Business Profile (which cites NJ incorporation date 4/1/1987)
notes: Discrepancy on FMCSA status: SAFER snapshot URL (USDOT 2411126) on 06/03/2026 query returned 'record inactive', but BBB, Quick Transport Solutions, BrokerSnapshot, and TruckDriver.com all show the carrier as active with MC-829774 and recent MCS-150 from 06-JUN-2024. Likely SAFER caching/temporary inactive state - cross-source consensus is ACTIVE. Power units reported as 1 truck in 3rd-party listings (likely under-reported in MCS-150); 27 drivers consistent with a ~26-employee operation; family-owned NJ school bus contractor serving Pre-K to 12, athletic and field trip transport across NJ/PA/NY. Estimated annual revenue $1.1M. Member of NJ School Bus Contractors Association. Fleet size for school bus operations not separately disclosed in FMCSA data.

name: WCBC Professional Bus Svc
registry_source: Texas Secretary of State / Comptroller (not directly accessed)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'WCBC' or 'WCBC Professional Bus' - SAFER name search returned 'no records matching WCBC'. No Texas Secretary of State filing or Comptroller record located via web search; LinkedIn shows a generic 'Wcbc Inc' company page with no public details. Possible explanations: (1) small intrastate-only TX bus operator below USDOT threshold or recently registered, (2) operates under a different legal entity name, or (3) defunct/out of business. Listed input address 329 County Road 3575, Paradise, TX 76073 (Wise County). Note - public records for the road show a similar address (239 CR 3575) associated with MVP Performance Parts, not a bus operator. Could not confidently match.
